all.description: Written by Dr. Ibrahim Al-Arab At a critical national moment that Lebanon is going through, where state institutions are eroding under the weight of economic collapse and intense political tensions, an organized campaign is escalating targeting the Army Commander, General Rudolph Heikal. all.description: The President of the Republic, General Joseph Aoun, affirmed that the Lebanese Army is a national institution that serves the interest of Lebanon and the Lebanese, and not the interest of anyone, not the parties, nor the sects, but rather the interest of the nation, and the unjustified campaigns that the army and its commander were subjected to will not leave any impact on the performance of the army, leadership and soldiers, and let those behind these campaigns be reassured that “their basket will be empty.”
